text:
The tester must send the written test report to the courts and the courts only by date roughly 6 weeks from the date the valid DNA order and BD1 is sent to [Cafcass] / [CAFCASS Cymru].

The costs of the sampling, testing and report with be paid for by [Cafcass] / [CAFCASS Cymru] in respect of proceedings in England and by the Ministry of Justice in respect of proceedings in Wales.

(or, if testing is not through cafcass/cafcass cymru)

The court office must complete Parts I and II of form BDI and send this to [name];

[Name] must contact an accredited tester and make arrangements for an appropriate sampler to obtain samples by [date];

At the time the samples are obtained the person giving the samples must provide to the sampler the completed form BD1, a copy of this order and photo identity;

The sampler must send the samples to the tester by [date];

The tester must send the written test report to the court and [Cafcass] / [CAFCASS Cymru] by [date];

The costs of sampling, testing and reporting must be paid by [name].

Permission to apply

[Name] has permission to apply for a

[child arrangements order;]

[prohibited steps order;]

[specific issues order;]

[special guardianship order].

Permission to withdraw

[Name] has permission to withdraw [his] / [her] application for a

[child arrangements order;]

[prohibited steps order;]

[specific issues order;]

[special guardianship order]

and the application is recorded by the court as withdrawn.

Police disclosure

A separate order is made in relation to police disclosure by 4.00pm on [date].

Position Statements

The parties must file with the court and serve on each other by no later than 11:00 am on the working day prior to the next hearing a position statement, including:

[a summary of the order or directions sought by that party at [that hearing] / [the final hearing]];

[his/her response to the section 7 report];

[confirming whether s/he is pursuing their allegations;

[a concise update as to the progress of contact];

[insert].

Prohibited steps order

[Name] must not
